Implement the requested task in the VitalPro monorepo.

Mandatory workflow:
1. Read AGENTS.md and target project files.
2. Keep the change scoped to one logical objective.
3. Preserve layer boundaries and Core/Health dependency rules.
4. Add/update tests for changed behavior.
5. Update OpenAPI contracts when external API behavior changes.
6. Run relevant quality commands before finalizing.

Expected output:
- Modified files and why they changed.
- Commands executed for validation.
- Remaining risks or follow-up work.
